rows.label: tev016701_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Mythos about Primordial Wilderness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Mythos about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Mythos about Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Mythos about Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0001
rows.name:
After Aisha came back the other
day, I gave her a collar that
contains a small camera.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0002
rows.name:
One of the images it collected
was of NLA, but taken from an
unbelievably high position.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0003
rows.name:
It looks like it was from somewhere
just north of the city. I didn't know
you could even get up that high.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0004
rows.name:
If I get any more interesting pictures
back from her, I'll let you know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0008
rows.name:
You can now keep pet dogs, as well as
cats made from Aisha's biological data,
in your rooms at the BLADE Home.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0009
rows.name:
To be clear, they're just Blue
Bloods, not real animals like Aisha.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0010
rows.name:
Even so, it's still pretty
great to have a pet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0011
rows.name:
But I recently had a few escape on
me. I was just heading out to post
the search request at Quest Board.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0012
rows.name:
If you complete the mission, I'll give you a
Blue Blood pet on the house! So if that sort
of thing interests you, please accept the job.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0017
rows.name:
The camera collar on Aisha
caught a really rare sight![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0018
rows.name:
It seems to be a Bias village, probably
somewhere in Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0019
rows.name:
And it looks like a Bias woman
is actually giving Aisha food![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0020
rows.name:
The Bias's face has a peaceful expression
that they don't reveal to us humans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0021
rows.name:
I mean, that's the impression I get, anyway.
But I wouldn't bet the house on it or
anything. You know how their faces are.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0026
rows.name:
I got some interesting pictures back from
the camera collar around Aisha's neck.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0027
rows.name:
I think they were taken near the
Canopied Nightwood in Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0028
rows.name:
It looks like the boulder
Aisha was napping on was
actually a camouflaged falsaxum![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0029
rows.name:
I was terrified that she'd
end up being eaten alive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0030
rows.name:
But it looks like Aisha took it
down with a vicious flurry of
cat punches and kitty kicks![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0031
rows.name:
...What? Aisha is an accomplished
BLADE. She's a member of the
Overed-hunting Avalanche Union.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0036
rows.name:
It was never part of the plan to
have Aisha aboard the White Whale.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0037
rows.name:
They figured that transporting
simple genetic data from animals
would have to be sufficient.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0038
rows.name:
But amidst the chaos surrounding
the launch, Aisha managed to
sneak into the engine room.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0039
rows.name:
I was the one who discovered her
there. I told Gwin, then we
reported it to Commander Vandham.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0040
rows.name:
We thought he'd be angry, but he gave us permission
to keep her! He said cats have ridden on ships
as good-luck charms since ancient times.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0041
rows.name:
There weren't any rats to hunt
on the White Whale, but she did
good work keeping up morale.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0042
rows.name:
Oh, if we're talking cars, I'm going
with a sports car all the way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0043
rows.name:
Sure, they may not have the
horsepower necessary to drive
around on the untamed plains of Mira...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0044
rows.name:
But that beautiful styling? The
smooth sensation of speed? They
personify the soul of the automobile![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0045
rows.name:
Oh, hi there, [ST:playername ]! Gwin and I were just
discussing our favorite automobiles.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0046
rows.name:
If you don't mind sharing, I'd
love to hear what kind of car
gets your heart racing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0047
rows.name:
I came here because Gwin offered
to treat me to a decent meal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0048
rows.name:
But it's pretty clear that I was
summoned so those two wouldn't
have to be alone together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016701_MSG0049
rows.name:
Next time, I've got to remember to
ask who else is coming before I accept.
This isn't helping Gwin at all![ST:wait ]
